overview: Tweet special life events from your own Twitter/X account. Log in with Internet Identity, connect your Twitter/X account via OAuth, then tap an event button (Marriage, Promotion, New Job, New Baby, Birthday, Graduation, or custom) to compose and post a tweet with a preview before it goes live.
features: Internet Identity login with first-user admin promotion
Admin settings page for Twitter/X Client ID configuration
Per-user OAuth 2.0 PKCE Twitter/X account connection
Event palette: Marriage, Promotion, New Job, New Baby, Birthday, Graduation, Other
Tweet preview modal with character count before posting
Success feedback with auto-return to event buttons
